pattern_summary: The defensible niche for our journal. The 2x2 quadrant {crypto-perp-native exchanges} x {playbook-level AI coaching} is empty in 2026. Stock/futures journals (Tradezella, TraderSync, JournalPlus) ship AI but treat crypto-perps as second-class (no Blofin/Hyperliquid native, no partial-close model, no funding-rate context). Crypto-native tools (TradesViz, TradeOS) support the exchanges but lack playbook-level AI. No one combines: native exchange integration + correct partial-close data model + funding/OI context + session-aware aggregation + playbook-level coaching.

ai_features.feature_name: Proposed: 'PerpCoach' (or align with existing TradeJournal naming) — a playbook-AI that natively speaks crypto-perp.
ai_features.ai_scope: Per-playbook with per-trade context-enrichment (funding/OI/session/liquidation-cluster fed in automatically).
ai_features.ai_proactive_vs_reactive: Hybrid: PROACTIVE weekly per-playbook digest + REACTIVE per-trade pressure-test + REACTIVE per-trade autopsy on close. Cadence ties to crypto's 24/7 session rhythm rather than stock-market open/close.
ai_features.ai_minimum_trade_threshold: 15+ per playbook for setup-coaching, 10+ for pre-trade history-lookup, n=1 always supported (graceful degradation).
ai_features.ai_underlying_tech: Claude API (own-key model preferred for privacy + cost-pass-through, given community is small and Denny's user-base is Dutch/EU). Structured aggregation layer in JS over localStorage trade-table + cached market-context (funding/OI snapshot at entry/exit per trade).
ai_features.output_format: Per-playbook cards + per-trade modals + weekly digest. Honest sample-size badges. Plain Dutch optional. Mobile-readable.
ai_features.notable_prompts: Combinations of pattern_setup_playbook_coaching + pattern_pre_trade_validation + pattern_per_trade_autopsy prompts, all enriched with crypto-specific context fields.

playbook_depth.playbook_concept_maturity: Target: rule-adherence-scored + AI-coached. Substrate: Bellafiore-style 5-variable playbook adapted for perps (Big Picture = BTC regime + BTC.D + risk-on/off; Catalyst = token-unlock / CEX-listing / macro print; Setup = SMC pattern library: BOS/FVG/OB/liquidity-sweep; Tape = DOM + funding-rate + OI-delta + liquidation-clusters; Intuition = user gut score).
playbook_depth.setup_level_ai: Killer feature: 'BOS+FVG: 62% WR London / 38% NY / fails 71% when funding > 0.02% at entry / TP3-hit-rate drops 40% in low-OI regimes' — auto-generated per playbook.
playbook_depth.rule_adherence_scoring: A/B/C grade per Bellafiore. A = all 5 SMB-vars met. B = 4/5. C = 3 or fewer (forced trade). Discipline-score = A% over rolling window.
playbook_depth.pre_trade_validation: Pressure-test button with auto-filled crypto-context (funding, OI-delta, BTC.D direction, session, liquidation-cluster distances).
playbook_depth.playbook_template_library: Ship 5-7 SMC-native templates: BOS+FVG long/short, Liquidity-sweep reversal, Range-break continuation, OB-retest, Session-open momentum. Each with default conditions tailored to perps.

crypto_fit.crypto_perp_exchange_support: Blofin, MEXC, Kraken Futures, Hyperliquid, FTMO-MT5 (CFD). Already integrated. Bybit/OKX/Binance later if community demand.
crypto_fit.multi_asset: Crypto-perp primary, FX/CFD via FTMO MT5 secondary. Spot crypto out-of-scope (different mental model).
crypto_fit.partial_close_awareness: First-class — multi-TP partial-close is the DEFAULT trade-model in our community (per project memory). Each TP-leg has its own R, hit-status, MFE/MAE. Aggregate trade is weighted-R across legs. No competitor models this correctly.
crypto_fit.funding_rate_context: Each trade snapshots funding-rate at entry + max funding during hold + funding-flip-event flag. Fed into per-trade autopsy AND per-playbook aggregation (e.g. 'this playbook's failure-mode correlates with funding>X').
crypto_fit.gap_session_breakdown_per_setup: Auto-computed: Amsterdam-tz session bucketing (Asia / London / NY-open / NY-close) x playbook = WR / avg-R grid. Headline insight per playbook in the weekly digest.

coaching_depth.coaching_depth_level: deep_pattern_analysis powered by structured aggregation. Causal claims defensible because crypto-context fields (funding/OI/session) are objective inputs.
coaching_depth.psychology_metrics: Tilt-meter triggered by post-loss revenge-trade pattern (next trade within X minutes, oversized). Discipline-score from A/B/C playbook-grades. Mindset prompts (already in app) tied to sessional cadence.
coaching_depth.mentor_mode: Future: community members (Sebas+Denny first) can review each other's playbook stats — but stats only, never trades themselves, to respect privacy-mode (per v12.127 release).

concrete_implementations_or_lack_thereof: TradeOS (wyckofflabs.com): closest competitor on exchange-support (Blofin, Hyperliquid, MEXC, FTMO). AI is per-trade only. Playbook-level coaching = GAP.
TradesViz: Hyperliquid native + AI chat (NL->DB queries). Analyst-style not coaching-style. Playbook-level AI = GAP.
JournalPlus: strongest playbook-AI substrate but CSV-only, no crypto-perp native, no partial-close model. Crypto-fit = GAP.
Tradezella / TraderSync: marketleaders for stocks/futures but treat crypto as afterthought. Both gaps.
Our TradeJournal: has the exchange-native substrate + partial-close awareness + Cloudflare-Worker pipeline. Missing: structured playbook entity + AI layer. THIS is the build-priority.
critique_and_risks: Risk 1 — SCOPE CREEP: trying to be both per-trade autopsy + setup coach + pre-trade gate + weekly digest in v1 will dilute every layer. Ship setup-level digest FIRST (the unique value), per-trade autopsy SECOND (table-stakes), pre-trade gate THIRD (green-field but UX-risky). Risk 2 — DATA-FRESHNESS: funding/OI/liquidation context requires per-trade snapshotting at entry/exit; if missed (e.g. CSV import) AI falls back to 'context not available'. Mitigation: make snapshot opportunistic at sync-time. Risk 3 — COMMUNITY SAMPLE-SIZE: small community = small per-user trade-counts at first; AI prompts must gracefully degrade with N<15 caveats. Risk 4 — REGULATORY: any pre-trade 'recommendation' wording must read as reflection-help not financial advice — Dutch AFM is permissive but visible reframing matters.
opportunity_gap_crypto_perp: Defensibility lasts only as long as the substrate (exchange-native data + partial-close model + funding/OI snapshots) takes to clone. Bellafiore-style structured playbook + per-playbook AI coach + crypto-context-aware = roughly 6-12 months of head-start once shipped, given no one has all four ingredients in 2026. The window closes when one of the big stock-journal players ships Blofin/Hyperliquid adapters (unlikely without dedicated crypto founder) OR a new crypto-native AI-journal ships with Bellafiore-grade playbooks (probable within 12-18 months).
uncertain: Whether any new entrant has shipped a Bellafiore-grade playbook + Claude-API + Hyperliquid native combo in stealth (low probability but worth a quarterly check)
Exact funding-rate threshold values that correlate with our community's playbook failures (need actual aggregate data — currently using illustrative numbers in prompts)
Cost-per-month for end-user when using own-Claude-API-key at production scale (depends heavily on prompt-design — target <$2/mo through aggressive caching of playbook-stats)
